title: Oops! All Missing Blocks!
description: All block textures seem to have vanished. Is it still possible to play the game?
body:
Inspired by other packs that replace block textures to something less... visually distinct, this one changes every single placeable block texture with the fallback pink and black checkerboard pattern. Does not affect GUI, item sprites, or mobs. Supports all versions post-The Flattening (1.13+).

Was this fun to make? _Hell no._

Does this serve any purpose? _More like a "why not"._

Is the game still playable? _From a technical definition, yes. :)_

![Minecraft End dimension. All visible block textures are replaced with the fallback pink and black checkerboard pattern used for when the default resource for a texture is missing.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/n3pqGKYV/images/85de6ddeba57d41e0c67e19ef04d1ffa3959b97c.png)
